expectations.text: Output is a single self-contained HTML file that opens in a browser with no build step
Includes KPI cards for at least 4 of: Total Revenue, Gross Profit, Marketing Spend, CAC, Active Customers
Includes a 12-month trend chart (line) plotting revenue and at least one other metric (COGS or gross profit) by month
expectations.evidence: charts[0] line chart, 12 labels, Revenue + COGS datasets each length 12.

expectations.text: Includes a region breakdown visualization (chart or table) showing North America, APAC, Europe, and LATAM
expectations.evidence: charts[2] doughnut chart, 4 regions, plus a detail table with the same 4 regions.

expectations.text: Monthly chart data point count matches the 12 months present in the source workbook
expectations.evidence: Verified directly from DASHBOARD_DATA: line chart labels length 12, each dataset length 12; gross-profit bar chart also 12.

expectations.text: Numeric KPI values are human-formatted (e.g. $13.7M) rather than raw unformatted numbers (e.g. 13700000)
